_brand.headline_font: Instrument Serif (or close substitute: Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond, EB Garamond)
_brand.body_font: Instrument Sans (or close substitute: Inter, IBM Plex Sans)
_brand.wordmark: Lower-left corner, small (~32px equivalent), text 'DigiStorms' in clean modern sans-serif, slate-900 #0F172A. Optional simple storm/spark glyph immediately to the left.
rules: ITALIC the emphasis word and color it primary blue #2563EB
Generous negative space — editorial restraint, NOT busy
No icons, no decorative shapes, no abstract patterns, no gradients beyond a subtle paper texture
No stock photography, no product mockups, no UI screenshots
No 3-column icon grids, no logo bars, no stats
Anti-AI-slop: do not add sparkles, neon glows, holographic effects, or generic 'tech' visual cliches
_brand.subline_position: Bottom-center, body grey #475569, sans-serif, ~22px equivalent. Optional — can be omitted if it crowds the layout.

_negative_prompt_suffix: no busy backgrounds, no decorative borders, no icons, no gradients, no abstract shapes, no neon, no glow, no sparkles, no holographic, no purple, no orange, no amber, no warning colors, no stock photo, no product mockup, no UI screenshot, no 3D, no isometric, no people, no hands typing, no laptop on desk, no chart, no graph
